task_completion.description: Create a bank record named 'Metro City Bank'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Bank window/form in iDempiere with the 'Name' field filled with 'Metro City Bank'.
Look for the 'Routing No' field in the Bank window filled with '021000021'.

task_completion.description: Create a bank account named 'Payroll Checking'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Bank Account tab/form in iDempiere with the 'Name' field filled with 'Payroll Checking'.
Look for the 'Account No' field in the Bank Account form filled with '888999000'.
Look for the 'Account Type' dropdown or field in the Bank Account form set to 'Checking' (or the code 'C').
Look for the 'Currency' dropdown or field in the Bank Account form set to 'USD'.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the iDempiere web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard iDempiere ERP layout with menus, toolbars, and tabs, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct SQL inserts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running psql or other database clients to insert the bank records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The bank name must be exactly 'Metro City Bank' and the routing number '021000021'. The bank account must be named 'Payroll Checking' with account number '888999000'. The account type must be 'Checking' (which may be represented as 'C' in iDempiere's system) and the currency must be 'USD'.
